GRAY_TEMPEST_RELIC_GRAY_GOO_CORE.title: Nanite Machine Individual
GRAY_TEMPEST_RELIC_GRAY_GOO_CORE.descrip: At the start of each combat, gain 1 Max HP. Channel 1 Strike Craft Unit.
GRAY_TEMPEST_RELIC_GRAY_GOO_CORE.flavor: The basic unit of the nanite swarm, capable of self-replication.
GRAY_TEMPEST_RELIC_SHIELD_RELIC.title: Shield Generator
GRAY_TEMPEST_RELIC_SHIELD_RELIC.descript: At the start of combat, gain 1 [gold]Focus[/gold] and Channel {Counter} Shield Generator Unit(s).
GRAY_TEMPEST_RELIC_ARMOR_RELIC.title: Armor
GRAY_TEMPEST_RELIC_ARMOR_RELIC.descripti: At the start of combat, gain Plating Armor. Upgrade level {Counter}.
GRAY_TEMPEST_RELIC_ARMOR_RELIC.flavor: Nanite plating reinforced over countless cycles.
GRAY_TEMPEST_RELIC_REACTOR_RELIC.title: Reactor
GRAY_TEMPEST_RELIC_REACTOR_RELIC.descrip: At the start of each of your first {Counter} turns, add 1 Redundancy to your hand.
GRAY_TEMPEST_RELIC_STRIKE_CRAFT_RELIC.de: At the start of combat, gain {Counter} Orb Slot{Counter:SlotPlural} and Channel {Counter} Strike Craft Unit{Counter:StrikeCraftPlural}.
GRAY_TEMPEST_RELIC_THRUSTER_RELIC.title: Thruster
GRAY_TEMPEST_RELIC_THRUSTER_RELIC.descri: At the start of combat, gain {Counter} Strength and {Counter} Dexterity.
GRAY_TEMPEST_RELIC_GRAY_GOO_CORE_PLUS.de: At the start of each combat, gain 3 Max HP, 3 [gold]Artifact[/gold], and Channel 1 of each Unit type.
GRAY_TEMPEST_RELIC_GRAY_GOO_CORE_PLUS.fl: The nanite swarm, refined by an ancient touch.
